header.title: Vyas
header.subtitle: Generative AI Intern @ Inspire Softech | Skilled in LLMs, Hugging Face, Prompt Engineering, Gradio, SQL, UiPath, pandas | AICTE-Certified

about.title: About Me
about.content: I am an Aspiring AI Engineer and Applied Data Science student with a passion for developing real-world solutions. My experience includes building projects like the emotion-aware Nova AI and a precision farming system called Aerorover. I am proficient in Python, MySQL, and FastAPI, and an active contributor to tech communities. I am currently honing my skills as an intern at Inspire Softech Solution.

items.title: Nova System AI
items.description: Next-generation Emotional AI System with real-time facial emotion detection, smart data logging, voice interaction, and a NOVA CLI with Neural Intent Engine for system-level control via natural language.

items.title: NOVA CLI
items.description: An AI-powered command-line assistant featuring a Neural Intent Engine (NIE) that processes natural language to control system functions like launching apps, adjusting volume, and taking screenshots.

items.title: Legal Case Law Bot
items.description: AI-driven knowledge management bot for legal case law. Uses NLP to parse, index, and retrieve relevant legal cases, enabling lawyers and researchers to find precedents efficiently.

items.title: AQI AI Agent
items.description: An AI agent that monitors and analyzes Air Quality Index data in real-time, providing insights and recommendations for environmental awareness using web scraping and data visualization.

items.title: MatsyaN - Fish Recognition
items.description: Intelligent fish species recognition and analysis system using deep learning and Gradio. Classifies fish species from images with CNNs, providing detailed species information and habitat data.

items.title: SentinelDB
items.description: AI-driven self-healing database layer that monitors query behavior, detects anomalies in data patterns, verifies data authenticity using cryptographic fingerprints, and assigns live Trust Scores.

items.title: RobinHood Tax System
items.description: Comprehensive tax compliance system with automated calculations, taxpayer management, multi-type notice generation, and CLI tools. Implements India's progressive tax system with Flask and MySQL.

items.title: Generative Design
items.description: Exploration of generative design patterns using Python and machine learning. Creates AI-generated visual designs, textures, and patterns through procedural generation algorithms.

items.title: DAC Website
items.description: Data Analytics Club website built with TypeScript featuring a Gemini API-powered chatbot, event management, member showcases, and modern glassmorphism UI design.

items.title: StudyBuddy Pro
items.description: A personal productivity and learning companion with gamification features, focus timers, and progress tracking. Built with React frontend and Node.js/SQLite backend for local-first architecture.

certificates.title: Building AI-Powered Search with MongoDB Vector Search

achievements.title: Nova AI Developer
achievements.description: Created a next-generation Emotional AI assistant with real-time facial emotion detection and voice interaction.
